name: SlopeDoku
blurb: Winter sudoku — two puzzles in every tile, bunny hill to double black, plus Avalanche.

name: SurfDoku
blurb: The beach remix — kiddie pool to double red flag, plus Riptide. Same brain, different weather.

name: MineDoku
blurb: Mine the numbers that don't belong — every row and column adds to its target. Surface Dig to The Core, plus Lantern memory digs and Cave-In.
